sources.dateFormat: ISO (YYYY-MM-DD) — stored by syncDailyQuotes via parseTwseDateToIso
sources.transformationPath: analyzeStock(symbol, asOf) → stockQuote.findMany(date lte asOfIso) → MA/RSI/MACD/momentum calculations
sources.asOfDateHandling: normalizePitDateToIso(asOf) applied before gate — P29F-Repair; ISO-to-ISO comparison correct
sources.futureDataRisk: Latent: only if future-dated records enter DB. Current sync: ingests current/past only.

sources.dateFormat: ISO (YYYY-MM-DD) — stored by syncMarketIndices via openapiDate
sources.asOfDateHandling: ISO asOf passed directly to gate — no format mismatch; ISO-to-ISO comparison correct
sources.futureDataRisk: Low. MA/momentum calculations are fully backward-looking on PIT-gated data.

sources.dateFormat: ISO (YYYY-MM-DD) — stored by syncInstitutionalChip as isoDate; schema comment 'YYYYMMDD' is stale
sources.transformationPath: analyzeStock(symbol, asOf) → institutionalChip.findMany(date lte asOfIso, take 60) → last 10 net-flow aggregation
sources.asOfDateHandling: normalizePitDateToIso(asOf) applied before gate — P29F-Repair; ISO-to-ISO comparison correct
sources.futureDataRisk: Latent + publication lag: T data published ~6pm on T. Post-close scoring correct. Pre-market: same-day chip not yet available.
sources.p29fClassification: PIT_SAFE_VERIFIED (after P29F-Repair); C-F05 publication lag documented as WARN_ASSUMPTION_REQUIRED

sources.futureDataRisk: N/A — source absent; fiscal month availability lag is a future audit concern
